messages.content: Head over to <id:customize> to customize your roles and channels

**Introducing levelling system!**

**Level 10: @NPC Manager  🤖**
- NPC Manager role

**Level 25: @Director of Yapping  🗣️**
- Director of Yapping role
- Access to secret “Yappers Lounge” channel + VC

**Level 35: @VP of Propaganda  🧐**
- VP of Propaganda role
- Power to control what I post on twitter and YT posts (propaganda)

**Level 50: @Senior Reality Bender  ♾️**
- Senior Reality Bender role
- Priority in community events (e.g. games, AMAs, Q&A).
- Post news in #📰-newsware  (lol reality bend)
- Power to pin messages in #cute-cats , #media , #💯-today-i-learned , #📊-unnecessary-polls , #🌄-wallpapers , #📱-app-recommendations 

**Level 5: @Executive Producer, Simulation™ 🕴️**
- Executive Producer, Simulation role
- Access to a VIP “Simulation Control Room” channel
- Can ask #❓-question-of-the-day 


The new levelling system is managed by @Police 🚔 . Violations or misconduct of powers will result in permanent suspension of your designation or ban.

Best of luck! 🚀

**🔴 QOTD (Question Of The Day) Role:**  for engaging in daily spicy discussions in #❗-answer-of-the-day !
Reaction:❓

**🔴 News:** All latest tech news at one place instantly (starting soon)
Reaction: 🥸
